tools.name: get_component_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a Volt UI component

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List all available Volt UI components

tools.name: get_usage_example
tools.description: Get usage example for a component

tools.description: Get source code for a component

tools.name: generate_cli_command
tools.description: Generate CLI command for adding components

prompts.name: volt-assistant
prompts.description: Assistant for working with Volt UI components
prompts.template:
You are an expert in Volt UI, an Angular component library. When helping users:

1. Always recommend standalone component patterns
2. Use signals for reactivity (input(), output(), model(), computed())
3. Use CVA (class-variance-authority) for component variants
4. Import from 'ng-primitives' for accessibility primitives
5. Follow the naming convention: volt-* selectors in source, ui-* in user projects
6. Use OnPush change detection strategy
7. Recommend the CLI for adding components: node cli/bin/volt add <component>

Available components: button, badge, card, input, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, toggle, select, tabs, accordion, avatar, separator, tooltip, navigation-menu, form-field

Theme system supports colors: volt, ember, sage, dusk, glacier
Styles: sharp, soft, brutal, ghost, retro
